name: Mighty Maned Lion
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a proud male lion standing in profile with a full flowing mane around its head and shoulders, a strong body, four sturdy legs, a long tail ending in a tufted tip, and a calm confident expression

name: Cute Lion Cub
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a chubby baby lion cub sitting up with big round eyes, a small fuzzy head with no mane, round ears, oversized paws, a tiny tufted tail, and a sweet happy smile

name: Roaring Lion Close-Up
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a close-up front-facing portrait of a lion's head with its mouth wide open in a big roar, large mane framing the whole face, visible teeth and tongue, whiskers, and fierce alert eyes

name: Watchful Lioness
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a sleek female lioness standing alert in profile with no mane, a smooth lean body, slender legs, a long tail, rounded ears, and a watchful gaze as if scanning the savanna

name: Lion on the Rock
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a male lion resting on top of a large flat rock looking out over the distance, full mane, front paws stretched forward, a long tail draped down the side of the rock, a few small grass tufts at the base

name: Sleeping Lion
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a relaxed lion lying down curled up asleep with its head resting on its front paws, eyes gently closed, a fluffy mane, and a peaceful smile, simple and chunky shapes

name: Lion Family Pride
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a lion family sitting together, a maned father lion beside a lioness with a small cub in front of them, all facing forward with warm friendly expressions, a few grass tufts around their feet

name: Playful Cub with Butterfly
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a playful lion cub crouched low with its rear up, batting a front paw at a fluttering butterfly above its nose, big curious eyes, round ears, and a little curled tail

name: Lion on the Savanna
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a male lion walking across open grassland with a flat-topped acacia tree behind it, a low sun and a few clouds in the sky, tall grass tufts and a small hill in the background

name: Lion Drinking at the Watering Hole
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a lion lowering its maned head to drink from a watering hole, its reflection rippling in the water, a couple of reeds and rocks at the edge, and tall grass behind it

name: Lion Cub and Mom
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a gentle mother lioness lowering her head to nuzzle her small cub, the cub looking up lovingly with big eyes, both sitting close together in a grassy clearing, warm tender expressions

name: Smiling Cartoon Lion
subject: animals/lion
prompt: a round friendly cartoon lion sitting and facing forward with a big cheerful smile, a simple ring-shaped mane, small round ears, dot eyes, and a curled tufted tail, made of big simple shapes
